title: Il maestro di Vigevano
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Elio Petri
actors: Alberto Sordi, Claire Bloom, Vito De Taranto
plot: Primary school teacher Mr. Mombelli, nevertheless satisfied with his life, is driven by his wife to resign and starting a new activity. He invest all his goodwill setting up a footwear little factory. But after some time, unexpect...
